title: The Journey Begins
highlight: Rahul: Take care in France! Yadav: I will, miss you buddy.
memory: The first day Yadav left for France. A mix of excitement and sadness as we said our goodbyes at the airport.
quote: Distance is just a test of how far friendship can travel.

title: Settling In
highlight: Yadav: France is beautiful, but I miss Indian tea already!
memory: Yadav sent the first photos of his dorm and the streets of Paris. Everything looks so different there.
quote: A new city, a new adventure, but the same bond.

title: First Class in France
highlight: Yadav: The professor speaks so fast! Rahul: You'll catch up, just keep nodding!
memory: Yadav's first day at the university. We spent an hour on video call while he tried to figure out the campus map.
quote: Learning is better when shared with a friend.

title: Eiffel Tower Night View
highlight: Rahul: It's glowing! Yadav: It looks even better in person, I wish you were here.
memory: Yadav finally visited the Eiffel Tower at night. He video-called me right when the lights started sparkling.
quote: Some things are too beautiful to see alone.

title: Cooking Mishaps
highlight: Yadav: How much salt? Rahul: Just a pinch! Yadav: I think I put a handful... (The dal is blue... HOW?!)
memory: Yadav tried to cook Indian food for the first time. The result was... interesting. We laughed about it for hours.
quote: Laughter is the best ingredient.

title: Coffee in Paris
highlight: Yadav: Sitting at a cafe, feeling like a local. Rahul: Don't forget your accent!
memory: A chill day. Yadav sat at a Parisian cafe and watched the world go by while we texted about our future plans.
quote: Happiness is a cup of coffee and a good conversation.

title: Missing the Chaos
highlight: Yadav: It's too quiet here. Rahul: I'll send you a recording of the traffic!
memory: We talked about how much he misses the noise and energy of home. Distance makes you appreciate the small things.
quote: Distance makes the heart grow fonder.

title: Art at the Louvre
highlight: Yadav: Mona Lisa is smaller than I thought. Rahul: Just like your patience!
memory: Yadav visited the Louvre. He sent a selfie with the pyramid. We joked about him becoming a high-end art thief.
quote: Art is the window to the soul.

title: March Beginnings
highlight: Rahul: One month down! Yadav: Time flies when you're exploring.
memory: A milestone day. One month since he started planning this journey. We celebrated with a virtual toast.
quote: Every new month is a new opportunity.

title: The Rainy Side of France
highlight: Yadav: It won't stop raining! Rahul: At least your dorm is cozy.
memory: It was a rainy day in France. We spent the afternoon watching the same movie while on a discord call.
quote: Rainy days are for long talks.

title: New Friends
highlight: Yadav: Met some cool people today! Rahul: Don't replace me yet!
memory: Yadav went out with his classmates. He sent photos of them at a park. Happy to see him settling in.
quote: Friendship is the only cement that will ever hold the world together.

title: Video Call Marathon
highlight: Rahul: 3 hours already? Yadav: Feels like 5 minutes.
memory: One of those days where we just couldn't stop talking. Everything from deep life talks to stupid memes.
quote: Time doesn't exist when you're with a best friend.

title: French Bakery Adventure
highlight: Yadav: I ate three croissants. Rahul: Only three? I'm disappointed.
memory: Yadav found a local bakery. The photos of the pastries made me so hungry. We planned to visit one together someday.
quote: Life is uncertain. Eat dessert first.

title: Study Sessions
highlight: Yadav: This exam will be the death of me. Rahul: I'll prepare the eulogy.
memory: Helping Yadav study for his first midterms. Well, mostly me distracting him with funny TikToks.
quote: Study hard, but laugh harder.

title: The Metro Incident
highlight: Yadav: I got lost on the metro. Rahul: HOW do you get lost on a straight line?!
memory: Yadav ended up on the wrong side of Paris because he missed his stop. A scary but funny story in retrospect.
quote: Not all who wander are lost, but some just miss their stop.

title: Women's Day Wishes
highlight: Yadav: Wishing all the strong women we know. Rahul: Cheers to that!
memory: We talked about the influential women in our lives. A thoughtful conversation about respect and support.
quote: Empowered women empower women.

title: Late Night Gaming
highlight: Rahul: One more round? Yadav: It's 3 AM here! ...Okay, one more.
memory: Despite the timezone difference, we managed to play some games together. Latency was high, but the fun was higher.
quote: Gamers don't die, they respawn.

title: Spring Sneak Peek
highlight: Yadav: The flowers are starting to bloom. Rahul: Still winter here!
memory: The weather is changing in France. Yadav sent photos of cherry blossoms starting to appear in the park.
quote: Spring is nature's way of saying 'Let's party!'

title: Deep Conversations
highlight: Rahul: Do you think we'll still be this close in 10 years? Yadav: Without a doubt.
memory: One of those rare moments where we got really serious about our friendship and the future. Very emotional.
quote: A true friend is someone who is always there for you.

title: Just Random Memes
highlight: Yadav: *Sends cat meme* Rahul: *Sends dog meme*
memory: An entire day of just sending each other the most cursed memes we could find. Pure chaos.
quote: Memes are the language of our generation.

title: Today's Update
highlight: Rahul: Adding all these to the website now. Yadav: What website?!
memory: Working on this digital diary. Today marks a big update as I document all the days since he left. It's becoming beautiful.
quote: Every day is a page in our story.
